titleStmt.title: SII 9.203: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 203. (A.R. No. 76 of 1904.) ON THE FOURTH SLAB SET UP IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is a little damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 47, Śubhakṛit, Āśvayuja, puṇṇame, Sōmavāra, Sōma-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1122 September, 17, Sunday (not Monday), when there was a lunar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḻambavāḍi thirty-two-thousand. With the consent of the Mahājanas of the village Baḷguḷi, Dāsayya-Nāyaka, son of Mārtaṇḍayya of the Vāsishṭha-gōtra, is said to have made a gift of 3 mattars and 300 kammas of land for a khaṇḍika.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salluttamire
© tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyu
maṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakama
ḷamārttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīma
tribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nāmādi
samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
tribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvarnnoḷaṁbavāḍi mū
vattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭaniga haviśiṣṭapratipāḷa
na(ṁ)mmāḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire © svasti
śrīmatu cāḷukyavikramavarṣada 47 neya śubha
kritsaṁvatsarada Āśvayujada puṇname sōma
vāraṁ sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu svasti yamaniya
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhisa
kaḷavastuguṇasaṁpannarappa da hariścaṁdradetti
yagrahāraṁ bāḷguḷiya pramukhamahā
janamayvadiṁbaru stavastuguṇasaṁpanna
rappa śrīma vaśiṣṭagōtrada mārttaṇḍayyana
magaṁ dāsayyanāyaka(ṁ)mmahājanaranuma
thadiṁ sarbbābādheparihāra(ṁ)mmānyamāge khaṇḍikakke biṭṭa
karmmaṇyagēriya Ereya hasalu hannera
ḍeṁbudu mattaru 3 kammaṁ 300 Ī khaṇḍikamaṁ varṣakko
rbbare pēḷvudī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge prayāge vā
raṇāsikurukṣētradoḷ sāsirbbarvvēdaśāstrapāragargge
sāsira kavileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakku
Ī khaṇḍikeya sthānikaru pēḷvudu parasthānadavarigillī dharmmama
naḷidātanābrāhmaṇarumananitu kavile
yumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . saṁdātātsumahatsakhyaṁ
duḥkhamanyatra pālanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānā
tsrēyōnupālanāt .
Digital edition of SII 9.203 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
